@floorcolor CYN
@wallcolor RED

@rampcolor WHT
@beltcolor PUR
@itemcolor RED

@guardians
y=24 x=2(0..7) v=1 f=0..3 PUR
y=24 x=12(9..15) v=-1 f=4..7 YEL
y=48 x=16(8..16) v=-1 f=8..11 WHT

y=96 x=16(0..22) v=-1 f=16..23 GRN
